title: How to view form responses as a form
excerpt:
Hi, how can I get a forms data as a template (similarly to google forms) after it enters my table? and also how can I relay information from a form via email? 
Tnx

posts.author: Co.Do (Lital)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, how can I get a forms data as a template (similarly to google forms) after it enters my table? and also how can I relay information from a form via email?
Tnx

posts.author: Nataly (Nataly)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Co.Do
You can view all information that came in via forms through the “Form Viewer” - which you can find in the view center within your board. Here you will be able to view all the form responses as a form itself.

Additionally, if you are wanting to send this information via email, since the form information is inputted into the board, you can set up an integration with your email and decide what columns to send in the email.

Hope that helps!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
